title: /Users/masayuki/Dev/claude-config/.claude 内容を表示せよ
summary_text: **Findings** - **High**: prompt files are hard-required by runtime checks; retirement would cause immediate failures. [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh):5, [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh):6, [check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/scripts/check-codex-kernel-prompt.sh):35 [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh):5, [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh):6, [check-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/scripts/check-codex-vote-prompt.sh):105 - **High**: test entrypoints call those check scripts directly, so prompt-only retirement breaks test contracts. [test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-codex-kernel-prompt.sh):5, [test-codex-vote-prompt.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/tests/test-codex-vote-prompt.sh):5 - **Medium**: workflow path filters explicitly track all four prompt files; prompt-only retirement alters gate coverage and governance behavior. [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml):48, [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml):49, [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml):50, [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml):51, [fugue-orchestration-gate.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/_worktrees/fugue-orchestrator-happy-kernel-landing-20260312/.github/workflows/fugue-orchestration-gate.yml):106 - **Low**: under `docs/` itself, there are no direct `.codex/prompts/{kernel,k,vote,v}.md` references, so docs-only coupling is not the blocker. **Verdict** Archive-retiring **just** `.codex/prompts/{kernel,k,vote,v}.md` is **not safe** and should be **left intact**. If retirement is desired, it must be done as a coordinated retirement of scripts/tests/workflow contracts in the same change set.
